title: Require Oclif App Configuration
forbids: an incorrectly identified, unversioned, or non-ESM CLI package; a missing declared Oclif extension dependency; mismatched binary or command discovery; or an ambiguous source-to-output mapping
why: Package configuration is the installed CLI identity. This first closed ratchet fixes the app identity, binary, declared Oclif dependency, compiled command root, and TypeScript source-to-output mapping. The same rule tightens when native extension composition and generated release manifests land.
remediate: Declare the versioned @rawr/cli ESM package and rawr binary, depend on @oclif/plugin-plugins, discover dist/commands, and map TypeScript rootDir src to outDir dist.
message: The Oclif app package must describe one conventional installed CLI.
